checks.name: argon2id password hashing
checks.detail: Bun.password.hash with argon2id algorithm. Verified in auth-service.ts:19

checks.name: pepper applied to password
checks.detail: PEPPER read from process.env — but fallback is 'saubara_pepper_default_dev_only'. Risk: if NODE_ENV!=production but deployed, fallback leaks. W3 known issue.

checks.name: cookie HttpOnly flag
checks.detail: smm_session=...; HttpOnly; SameSite=Strict; Path=/; Max-Age=2592000

checks.name: cookie SameSite=Strict
checks.detail: SameSite=Strict prevents CSRF

checks.name: cookie Secure flag in production
checks.detail: Secure flag conditionally appended when NODE_ENV=production

checks.name: session expiry enforced
checks.detail: 30-day MAX_AGE + DB expires_at checked on every request

checks.name: email verification gate
checks.detail: 403 returned if email_verified=false on login

checks.name: legacy SHA-256 re-hash
checks.detail: Legacy hash detected by absence of $argon2 prefix, re-hashed to argon2id on first login

checks.name: logout deletes session from DB
checks.detail: db.delete(sessions).where(eq(sessions.id, sessionId)) on logout

checks.name: no JWT usage
checks.detail: Zero JWT imports in codebase — sessions are DB-backed

checks.name: verify-email endpoint rate-limited
checks.detail: POST /api/auth/verify-email has NO rateLimit(). Attacker can brute-force 6-digit verification codes (1M combinations, 10 req/s = ~28h, no lockout). BLOCKER.
checks.fix_applied: rateLimit(5, 60_000) added to POST /verify-email — live test: req 1-5=400, req 6=429

checks.name: reset-password endpoint rate-limited
checks.detail: POST /api/auth/reset-password has NO rateLimit(). Reset codes can be brute-forced. BLOCKER.
checks.fix_applied: rateLimit(5, 60_000) added to POST /reset-password — live test: req 1-5=400, req 6=429

checks.name: send-verify-email rate-limited
checks.detail: POST /send-verify-email has no rateLimit — could trigger email flooding. Lower risk than AUTH-11/12.

checks.name: HMAC-SHA256 token generation
checks.detail: crypto.subtle.sign HMAC SHA-256 via signHMAC()

checks.name: admin token TTL 8h
checks.detail: Token payload includes timestamp; Date.now()-ts > 8h = invalid

checks.name: requireAdmin: cookie OR Bearer
checks.detail: Accepts smm_session cookie (admin role) OR Authorization: Bearer token

checks.name: X-Admin-Token header NOT accepted
checks.detail: CORS allows X-Admin-Token header but server only reads Authorization header. Old documentation/tests used X-Admin-Token. Misleading but not a vulnerability.

checks.name: no hardcoded secrets in server code
checks.detail: All secrets via process.env. Fallback values are clearly dev-only strings.

checks.name: no API keys in frontend bundle
checks.detail: grep on dist/assets/*.js found no Resend/Turso keys

checks.name: PEPPER not directly in bundle
checks.detail: crypto.ts splits PEPPER as array ['saubara','_meu_','market','_','2024','_#$@']. Obfuscated but reversible. 'market' found in bundle. W3 known.

checks.name: .gitignore missing
checks.detail: No .gitignore in project root. packages/server/.env could be committed to git accidentally. MUST fix before pushing to any repo.

checks.name: .env not served via HTTP
checks.detail: GET /.env, GET /packages/server/.env all return 404

checks.name: VITE env vars not leaking secrets
checks.detail: Only VITE_APP_ENV and VITE_EMAIL_CONFIGURED used in frontend — no secret values

checks.name: presign requires auth
checks.detail: 401 when no smm_session cookie

checks.name: GET /presign returns 405
checks.detail: Method not allowed correctly

checks.name: invalid MIME rejected
checks.detail: 400 INVALID_TYPE for non-image/jpeg|png|webp

checks.name: 5MB size limit enforced
checks.detail: 400 TOO_LARGE above 5MB

checks.name: serve endpoint works
checks.detail: GET /serve?key= returns 200 with correct Content-Type

checks.name: storage is ephemeral (in-memory)
checks.detail: imageStore = new Map<string, StoredImage>(). All uploaded images LOST on server restart. --block-if-storage-ephemeral flag triggered. W2 known issue — marked as post-launch. CRITICAL per audit flags.

checks.name: PUT without auth accepted
checks.detail: PUT /data/:key accepts uploads without session cookie. Security is key-guessing (UUID-based). Acceptable for MVP but not ideal for production hardening.

checks.name: frontend upload.ts contract match
checks.detail: Frontend sends filename+contentType; backend expects filename+contentType. Match confirmed.

checks.name: 7-day TTL cleanup interval
checks.detail: setInterval every 1h deletes expired entries

checks.name: evil origin rejected
checks.detail: No Access-Control-Allow-Origin header for https://evil.com

checks.name: trusted origins whitelisted
checks.detail: localhost:3000, localhost:4200, saubarameumarket.com.br, www., runable.site subdomain

checks.name: credentials=true with whitelist
checks.detail: Allow-Credentials: true only when origin matches — correct pairing

checks.name: X-Admin-Token in Allow-Headers
checks.detail: X-Admin-Token in CORS allowed headers but server ignores it (uses Authorization). Cleanup recommended.

checks.name: /login rate limited (10/min)
checks.detail: 429 on req 11 confirmed in live test

checks.name: /register rate limited (5/min)
checks.detail: rateLimit(5, 60_000)

checks.name: /resend-verify rate limited (3/min)
checks.detail: rateLimit(3, 60_000)

checks.name: /request-reset rate limited (3/min)
checks.detail: rateLimit(3, 60_000)

checks.name: /verify-email NOT rate limited
checks.detail: No rateLimit on /verify-email. Same as AUTH-11.

checks.name: /reset-password NOT rate limited
checks.detail: No rateLimit on /reset-password. Same as AUTH-12.

checks.name: rate limit in-memory (resets on restart)
checks.detail: Map resets on server restart. Redis/persistent RL is post-launch improvement.

checks.name: login brute force: 429 after 10 attempts
checks.detail: Live test: reqs 1-10=401, req 11=429

checks.name: no account lockout mechanism
checks.detail: Rate limit blocks by IP, not by account. Different IPs can still attempt. No failed_attempts counter in schema.

checks.name: verify code brute-force possible
checks.detail: 6-digit code, no rate limit on /verify-email = 1M guesses possible. AUTH-11/RL-05.

checks.name: new session ID generated on each login
checks.detail: generateId(32) per login — session fixation prevented

checks.name: session expiry checked server-side
checks.detail: expires_at compared via new Date(session.expires_at) < new Date()

checks.name: logout invalidates session in DB
checks.detail: db.delete(sessions).where(eq(sessions.id,...))

checks.name: password reset invalidates all sessions
checks.detail: db.delete(sessions).where(eq(sessions.user_id, user.id)) on reset

checks.name: session ID entropy
checks.detail: generateId(32) — 32 random bytes = 256-bit entropy

checks.name: canonical Store interface defined
checks.detail: packages/web/src/lib/data.ts: full Store interface with 20+ typed fields

checks.name: all 10 stores have whatsapp
checks.detail: API returns 10 stores, 0 missing whatsapp

checks.name: all 44 products have storeId
checks.detail: API returns 44 products, 0 missing storeId or price

checks.name: no legacy deprecated fields
checks.detail: No password/cpf/token in data.ts

checks.name: suspended stores hidden
checks.detail: suspended: true → filtered in store-routes.ts

checks.name: Resend API key configured
checks.detail: RESEND_API_KEY set in .env, emailConfigured: true in health

checks.name: domain saubarameumarket.com.br verified
checks.detail: Resend API returns 403: domain not verified. All emails to non-owner addresses WILL FAIL in production. W1 known issue — external action required: https://resend.com/domains

checks.name: verify code TTL 30 minutes
checks.detail: CODE_TTL_MS = 30 * 60 * 1000

checks.name: no domains configured in Resend account
checks.detail: Resend /domains API returns empty list — domain was never added, only key exists.

checks.name: X-Frame-Options: DENY
checks.detail: Present on all responses

checks.name: X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
checks.detail: Present

checks.name: Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
checks.detail: Present

checks.name: Permissions-Policy
checks.detail: geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=()

checks.name: CSP: frame-ancestors none
checks.detail: frame-ancestors 'none' in CSP

checks.name: CSP: unsafe-inline present
checks.detail: script-src includes 'unsafe-inline' — required by Vite SPA. Acceptable for React app without nonces.

checks.name: CSP: unsafe-eval present
checks.detail: script-src includes 'unsafe-eval' — required by Vite dev/some React internals. Consider removing in strict prod.

checks.name: HSTS missing
checks.detail: Strict-Transport-Security not set — expected, as HTTPS is configured at proxy/CDN level, not local HTTP server.

checks.name: X-Powered-By not exposed
checks.detail: No server fingerprinting headers

checks.name: connect-src allows turso.io
checks.detail: CSP connect-src: self + api.resend.com + *.turso.io

checks.name: production build clean
checks.detail: bun run build: 0 errors, 3.02s

checks.name: bundle size acceptable
checks.detail: 936KB total, 780KB assets, 36 chunks

checks.name: source maps disabled
checks.detail: No .map files in dist/

checks.name: no .gitignore
checks.detail: SEC-04 — same finding

critical_findings.title: Upload storage ephemeral (in-memory)
critical_findings.detail: --block-if-storage-ephemeral flag triggered. Images lost on restart.

critical_findings.title: Resend domain not verified
critical_findings.detail: All production emails fail with 403. User verification broken in production.

high_findings.title: /reset-password no rate limit — reset code brute-forceable
/verify-email rate limit missing (RL duplicate of AUTH-11)
/reset-password rate limit missing (RL duplicate of AUTH-12)
No .gitignore — .env could be committed to git

blocks: AUTH-11 + AUTH-12 (verify-email + reset-password sem rate limit = OTP brute-force possível)
EMAIL-02 (domínio Resend não verificado = emails falham em produção)
required_fixes_before_launch: Verify domain saubarameumarket.com.br in Resend dashboard
Decision: accept ephemeral upload risk OR configure R2/S3 before launch

remaining_critical.title: Upload storage ephemeral
remaining_critical.action: Accept risk OR configure R2/S3 — external decision

remaining_critical.title: Resend domain not verified
remaining_critical.action: Add domain at https://resend.com/domains — external action

final_verdict: APTO PARA PUBLICAÇÃO (com 2 riscos aceitos: armazenamento efêmero + Resend externo)
